title: Post Disaster Cleanup - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Post Disaster Cleanup 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO DCM LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS), in partnership with 211info, assists with disaster-related immediate or long-term recovery housing, shelter, food, and other needs for community members impacted by Oregon wildfires and other large scale disasters. 211info provides intake and referral for the program. Eligibility: Varies by service. Mainly serves people impacted by natural disasters that took place in Oregon and who are in need of recovery-related assistance. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term recovery assistance for Douglas County residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding. Assistance may include support with housing, home rehabilitation, debris clean up, emergency food, clothing and home furnishings, and mental health services. May be able to refer to home safety inspectors and well water testing assistance. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES HARNEY COUNTY MARCH 2025 FLOOD CLEAN UP SURVEY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a survey form to submit information to obtain assistance in pumping water out of a crawl space or basement, mucking and gutting, and debris cleanup due to the March 2025 flood. Confidential Address Eligibility: Residents who experienced damage during the March 2025 flood Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT
